description: The SlotRaycastTransferPortal acts very similarly to the MeshUVRaycastPortal except that it works on colliders hitting a slot hiearchy to another slot rather than just a mesh and a camera.

fields.Exit: The slot to send the raycast through if it hits this slot's hierarchy, converting the hit point / direction in this component slot's local space to the space of the slot specified here.
fields.OverrideHitTriggers: Whether to override if a laser coming through will hit triggers and what to override it with.
fields.Filter: The filter we should apply if a raycast comes through this portal?
fields.FilterMode: If a raycast being transfered has its own filter, how should we combine it with ``Filter`` if it exists?.
